CARLSMITH BALL WICHMAN MURRAY CASE MUKAI & ICHIKI
ATTORNEYS AT LAW
A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING LAW CORPORATIONS

HONOLULU OFFICE
TELEPHONE (808) 523-2500
FAX (808) 523-0842

301 EAST OCEAN BOULEVARD, SUITE 700
LONG BEACH, CALIFORNIA 90802-4828

LOS ANGELES-DOWNTOWN OFFICE
TELEPHONE (213) 955-1200
FAX (213) 623-0032

TELEPHONE (213) 435-5631
FAX (213) 437-3760
(213) 590-9771

LOS ANGELES-WILSHIRE OFFICE
TELEPHONE (213) 937-8999
FAX (213) 935-0493

LONG BEACH OFFICE
TELEPHONE (213) 435-5631
FAX (213) 437-3760

GUAM OFFICE
TELEPHONE (671) 472-6813
FAX (671) 477-4375

HILO OFFICE
TELEPHONE (808) 935-6644
FAX (808) 935-7975

KONA OFFICE
TELEPHONE (808) 329-6464
FAX (808) 329-9450

MAUI OFFICE
TELEPHONE (808) 242-4535
FAX (808) 244-4974

SAIPAN OFFICE
TELEPHONE (670) 322-3455
FAX (670) 322-3368

WASHINGTON, D.C. OFFICE
TELEPHONE (202) 628-4566
FAX (202) 628-4845

March 27, 1991

Our Reference No.:
046160/1

Scott Hallabrin, Esq.
Acting General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
426 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

We respectfully request written confirmation of your
advice on March 18, 1991 that pending Fair Political Practices
Commission action and/or adoption of amendments or new
regulations, the provisions of 2 Cal.Ad.C Sections 18623 and
18728 are in effect and applicable to participants in the
planning and conduct of the Seventeenth Annual Institute of
Governmental Advocates Summer Conference to be held August 8-
10, 1991 at Incline Village, Nevada.

Your courtesy and cooperation is appreciated very
much.

Sincerely yours,

CARLSMITH BALL WICHMAN MURRAY
CASE MUKAI & ICHIKI

ALLAN E. TEBBETTS

AET/

B9103757

embedding.qa_text: This is a letter dated March 27, 1991, from the law firm CARLSMITH BALL WICHMAN MURRAY CASE MUKAI & ICHIKI to Scott Hallabrin, Esq., Acting General Counsel of the Fair Political Practices Commission. The letter requests written confirmation of advice given on March 18, 1991, regarding the effect and applicability of certain regulations (sections 18623 and 18728) to participants in the Seventeenth Annual Institute of Governmental Advocates Summer Conference, which is scheduled for August 8-10, 1991, at Incline Village, Nevada. The letter expresses appreciation for Mr. Hallabrin's courtesy and cooperation. It is signed by Allan E. Tebbetts, who is identified as an attorney with the firm. Here is the full text of the letter: CARLSMITH BALL WICHMAN MURRAY CASE MUKAI & ICHIKI ATTORNEYS AT LAW A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING LAW CORPORATIONS 301 EAST OCEAN BOULEVARD, SUITE 700 LONG BEACH, CALIFORNIA 90802-4828 HONOLULU OFFICE TELEPHONE (808) 523-2500 FAX (808) 523-0842 LOS ANGELES-DOWNTOWN OFFICE TELEPHONE (213) 955-1200 FAX (213) 623-0032 LOS ANGELES-WILSHIRE OFFICE TELEPHONE (213) 937-8999 FAX (213) 935-0493 LONG BEACH OFFICE TELEPHONE (213) 435-5631 FAX (213) 437-3760 GUAM OFFICE TELEPHONE (671) 472-6813 FAX (671) 477-4375 HILO OFFICE TELEPHONE (808) 935-6644 FAX (808) 935-7975 KONA OFFICE TELEPHONE (808) 329-6464 FAX (808) 329-9450 MAUI OFFICE TELEPHONE (808) 242-4535 FAX (808) 244-4974 SAIPAN OFFICE TELEPHONE (670) 322-3455 FAX (670) 322-3368 WASHINGTON, D.C. OFFICE TELEPHONE (202) 628-4566 FAX (202) 628-4845 March 27, 1991 Scott Hallabrin, Esq. Acting General Counsel Fair Political Practices Commission 426 "J" Street, Suite 800 Sacramento, CA 95814 Dear Mr. Hallabrin: We respectfully request written confirmation of your advice on March 18, 1991 that pending Fair Political Practices Commission action and/or adoption of amendments or new regulations, the provisions of 2 Cal.Ad.C Sections 18623 and 18728 are in effect and applicable to participants in the planning and conduct of the Seventeenth Annual Institute of Governmental Advocates Summer Conference to be held August 8-10, 1991 at Incline Village, Nevada. Your courtesy and cooperation is appreciated very much. Sincerely yours, CARLSMITH BALL WICHMAN MURRAY CASE MUKAI & ICHIKI [signature] ALLAN E. TEBBETTS AET/
